message:
⚡ Optimize scroll position restoration to reduce forced reflows (#468)

Performance improvements to useLastRoute hook:

- Reduced max restore attempts from 40 to 10 (6s → 1s max)
- Reduced min attempts from 8 to 3 for faster stabilization
- Increased position tolerance from 2px to 5px
- Reduced retry delay from 150ms to 100ms
- Increased scroll debounce from 500ms to 1000ms

These changes reduce forced reflows caused by repeated
getBoundingClientRect() calls during dashboard navigation,
which was contributing to slow dashboard switches.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
